history.prompt:
Outfit: hot pink two-piece activewear set. Fitted long-sleeve cropped zip-up jacket with a simple stand collar, front zipper, slim sleeves, and high-waisted seamless leggings. The leggings have a smooth one-piece front panel, no awkward front line. Fabric looks ice-cool, breathable, quick-dry, high-stretch, smooth, and body-shaping.
Location: real outdoor café sidewalk beside a boutique fitness studio, soft morning sunlight. Keep the background clear, detailed, and never blurred: glass doors, café tables, chairs, plants, sidewalk, people walking by, cars passing, yoga mat near a chair, plain iced coffee cups with no readable labels.
Main character: confident American woman wearing the hot pink set and white sneakers. Handheld iPhone TikTok UGC style, natural movement, slight camera shake.
No subtitles, no text, no logo, no watermark, no brand names, no readable signs, no TikTok UI.
Opening:
Extreme close-up from chest to face. She touches the sleeve and zipper, looks at the camera, and says:
“This set looks cute, but the fabric is the real reason I’m obsessed.”
Camera close-up on sleeve, zipper, and smooth pink fabric in sunlight.
Breathable + quick-dry:
She lifts one arm, lightly fans the sleeve, and shakes the cuff.
Voiceover:
“It feels cool, breathable, and it dries fast.”
Camera close-up on sleeve and underarm fabric. Show lightweight movement, no sweat marks, no sticking, no heavy wrinkles.
High-stretch + shaping:
Full front view. She pulls the waistband slightly upward, turns her waist left and right, then raises both arms.
Voiceover:
“High stretch, but it still snatches the waist.”
Camera close-up on flat waistband and side waist stretch. Show no rolling, no digging in, no slipping.
Continuity:
Same woman, same face, same outfit, same color, same zipper, same waistband, same shoes, same location. No穿模, no fabric clipping, no body deformation, no extra fingers, no see-through fabric, no background blur.

history.prompt:
Create a vertical 9:16 TikTok UGC video continuing the same hot pink yoga set try-on.

Use the same woman, same hot pink zip-up jacket, same high-waisted seamless leggings, same white sneakers, same outdoor café fitness studio location, and same natural morning light. Background stays clear and detailed, never blurred.

No subtitles, no text, no logo, no watermark, no brand names, no readable signs, no TikTok UI.

Collar comfort:
Upper-body close-up. She touches the stand collar, turns her neck left and right, and smiles.
Voiceover:
“The collar is simple and clean. It doesn’t choke my neck.”

Camera close-up on the collar sitting comfortably below the jawline. No collar clipping, no zipper warping.

One-piece front:
Three-quarter front angle. She steps forward and gently smooths the front thigh fabric.
Voiceover:
“One-piece smooth front, no awkward line.”

Camera close-up from waistband to upper thigh. Show seamless front panel, no front seam, no camel-toe effect, no strange crease, no fabric distortion.

Squat test:
Side full-body view. She does one controlled squat, pauses, stands up, then turns to show side and back fit.
Voiceover:
“Stretchy, smooth, squat-ready, and still cute.”

Camera close-up on thigh and knee fabric during the squat. Show opaque, smooth, high-stretch fabric with no see-through, no pulling, no weird wrinkles.

Final CTA:
She walks beside the café table, picks up a plain iced coffee cup with no readable label, turns back, smiles, and says:
“If you want comfy, snatched, and still cute, this is the set.”

Anti-error:
No穿模, no body deformation, no warped hands, no extra fingers, no broken knees, no floating shoes, no fabric clipping, no zipper changing sides, no extra seams, no visible front seam, no awkward front line, no see-through fabric, no color change, no background blur.

history.prompt:
Create an 8-second vertical 9:16 handheld iPhone-style TikTok UGC fashion video.

No subtitles, no captions, no text overlay, no logo, no watermark, no TikTok UI, no readable signs, no readable labels, no brand names.

Scene: modern downtown sidewalk outside small cafés in soft afternoon daylight. Round metal café tables, iced drinks with condensation, napkins moving in a light breeze, pedestrians passing behind, a bicycle in the far background, low traffic sound, cups placed on tables, faint café chatter. Keep the background clear enough to see street, tables, chairs, people, and traffic. Do not blur the background.

Characters: two stylish women walking side by side like close friends. The main wearer wears one fitted long-sleeve top. The top keeps the same color, neckline, sleeve length, fit, and fabric texture throughout. The best friend holds one iced coffee in her right hand the entire time. Both women keep the same face, hairstyle, outfit, and body proportions.

Product: fitted long-sleeve top with smooth fabric, close body fit, clean shoulder line, slim waist shape, soft stretch, cool-touch surface, breathable feel, quick-dry behavior, and wrinkle-free finish. Fabric looks thin but not transparent, fitted but not tight, smooth but not plastic.

0-1s: Medium handheld walking shot. The best friend slows down, looks at the sleeve, raises one eyebrow, points with her left index finger, iced coffee steady in her right hand. Sunlight hits the wearer’s cheek and sleeve; she slightly squints, smiles, and looks down at the sleeve. A pedestrian passes behind; the wearer shifts her shoulder slightly inward.
Best friend: “Girl, don’t you overheat in that?”

1-2s: Close-up on sleeve. The wearer brushes from wrist to elbow with three fingers, presses her palm on the fabric, pinches the sleeve near the wrist, pulls it one inch from the skin, then releases. Fabric snaps back smooth, no sagging, no wrinkles.
Wearer: “Nope. It feels cool right when it touches my skin.”

2-3s: Front medium close-up. The wearer lifts her forearm, opens the sleeve slightly away from the skin to show airflow, takes one relaxed breath, shoulders drop. Breeze moves hair across her cheek; she tucks it behind her ear, then returns her hand to the sleeve.
Wearer: “It lets my skin breathe. No trapped heat.”

3-4s: Close-up near café table. The wearer touches an iced drink; condensation wets her fingertips. She taps the damp fingers near the sleeve cuff and rubs the fabric once. Sleeve does not darken, cling, sag, or twist.
Wearer: “And it doesn’t get sticky.”

4-5s: Walking tracking shot. The wearer takes three quick steps, swings her arm, then lifts her elbow like adjusting a bag strap. Sleeve stretches at the elbow, then smooths back out. Top stays flat at shoulder, waist, and armpit.
Wearer: “It dries fast when I’m moving around.”

5-6s: The best friend steps closer, touches the shoulder fabric with two fingers, rubs it once, presses the sleeve, then releases. Her expression changes from skeptical squint to widened eyes, parted lips, then two small nods. Iced coffee stays in her right hand.
Best friend: “Wait… it’s soft, and it’s not thick?”

6-7s: Upper-body fit check. The wearer faces camera, smooths the front of the top downward from chest to waist with both hands, turns 45 degrees to show side shape, lifts one arm shoulder-high, bends elbow, lowers it. Top stays fitted, flat, and wrinkle-free.
Wearer: “Soft, fitted, and it stays smooth.”

7-8s: Final walking shot. The wearer turns her head back to camera while walking, brushes the sleeve once, and gives a satisfied smile. The best friend looks from the sleeve to her face and nods. Product stays centered until the last frame.
Best friend: “Okay, I need that.”
Wearer: “This is the long sleeve I can wear all day.”

Camera: vertical 9:16, handheld phone movement, slight walking shake, close enough to show sleeve texture, waist fit, shoulder line, and hand contact. Do not cut during sleeve pinch, fabric release, damp finger touch, best friend fabric touch, or final fit check.

Continuity: same wearer, same best friend, same café street, same iced coffee, same top, same color, same neckline, same fit. Hands have five fingers and normal joints. Pedestrians stay behind and never block the product. No product deformation, no transparent fabric, no outfit change, no face change, no hairstyle change, no object popping in or disappearing.

9:16 vertical, Location: Downtown sidewalk with cafés, modern architecture, soft daylight. Casual post-yoga street vibe.

Outfit:Buttery smooth fabric, cool-touch, breathable, quick-dry, flat matte surface, seamless fit, no logos, no patterns.

0-3s (抓眼球)： Two friends step out of a yoga studio. Camera zooms slightly on the fresh, sweat-free look. Bestie: “Wait… you just finished yoga? You already look perfect!”

3-7s (好奇)： Wearer lightly brushes the sleeve, showing smooth fabric. Close-up reveals matte, seamless texture. You: “That’s why I love this set—it feels cool and soft on the skin.”

7-11s (确认优势)： Bestie leans in and touches the sleeve, eyes widening. Bestie: “Oh wow… it actually feels cool.”

11-15s (行动号召)： Wearer gestures to the full outfit while walking confidently down the sidewalk. You: “Breathable, quick-dry, and so light for summer.” Bestie: “Okay… I need one before my next class.”
